tasks.title: Agent Edit Page Implementation
tasks.description: Create a comprehensive /edit-agent page that mirrors the functionality of the /create-agent page, allowing users to modify existing agent configurations through a dynamic form interface with Supabase integration.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit Testing:
- Verify form initialization with mock agent data
- Test all form field interactions and validations
- Validate JSON config transformation
- Test error handling scenarios

2. Integration Testing:
- Test complete form submission flow
- Verify Supabase update operations
- Check loading states and error handling
- Test navigation and redirects

3. E2E Testing:
- Navigate to edit page with existing agent
- Modify all field types (text, arrays, JSON)
- Submit form and verify database updates
- Verify success/error scenarios

4. Manual Testing Checklist:
- Load existing agent data correctly
- Edit all field types
- Validate form submissions
- Check responsive design
- Verify theme consistency
- Test error scenarios
- Confirm success flows

subtasks.title: Analyze Repository Structure and Setup Edit Page Component
subtasks.description: Review existing codebase patterns and create the base EditAgentPage component structure
subtasks.details:
1. Review /create-agent implementation patterns
2. Create pages/edit-agent/[id].tsx file
3. Setup basic component structure with TypeScript interfaces
4. Add routing parameters for agent ID
5. Implement basic layout matching create-agent page
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify component renders without errors and correctly receives route parameters

subtasks.title: Implement Agent Data Fetching Logic
subtasks.description: Create data fetching functionality to retrieve existing agent data for editing
subtasks.details:
1. Create getAgent query function in api/agents
2. Implement useQuery hook for data fetching
3. Add loading state handling
4. Implement error boundary and error state display
5. Type agent response data
subtasks.testStrategy: Test data fetching with mock responses and error scenarios

subtasks.title: Setup Form Structure with Initial Data
subtasks.description: Initialize react-hook-form with existing agent data and implement form fields
subtasks.details:
1. Setup useForm hook with AgentFormData type
2. Create form field components
3. Implement form validation rules
4. Add form reset functionality
5. Setup default values from fetched data
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify form initialization with mock data and field validation

subtasks.title: Implement Dynamic Parameter Fields
subtasks.description: Add support for editing header and body parameters with JSON config handling
subtasks.details:
1. Create dynamic field arrays for parameters
2. Implement add/remove parameter functionality
3. Setup JSON config field handling
4. Add parameter validation
5. Ensure proper data transformation
subtasks.testStrategy: Test parameter field addition/removal and JSON validation

subtasks.title: Create Supabase Update Integration
subtasks.description: Implement agent update functionality with Supabase
subtasks.details:
1. Create updateAgent mutation function
2. Implement optimistic updates
3. Add proper error handling
4. Setup success notifications
5. Add TypeScript safety checks
subtasks.testStrategy: Test update operations with various data scenarios

subtasks.title: Enhance UI/UX and Responsive Design
subtasks.description: Implement loading states, error handling, and responsive design
subtasks.details:
1. Add loading indicators
2. Implement error message displays
3. Add success confirmation
4. Setup responsive breakpoints
5. Integrate theme providers
subtasks.testStrategy: Test responsive behavior and UI state transitions

subtasks.title: Security and Code Quality
subtasks.description: Implement security measures and ensure code quality
subtasks.details:
1. Review and update RLS policies
2. Add input sanitization
3. Fix lint errors
4. Add proper TypeScript types
5. Document component usage
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify security measures and run linting checks
